metadata.entity_build: processed-entities/2026-07-19/entities-20260719-1725.json (226 entities, 12 cycles, 14 critical/103 priority/109 normal). Finalized 01:24 MYT 20 Jul. Supersedes 205-entity 1435 build used by rev13 (finalized 22:41 MYT 19 Jul). +21 new entities + 13 updates from cycles 153300 (23:33 MYT) + 171500 (01:15 MYT 20 Jul, Harian Metro feed recovery HTTP 200, 17 new full-text). KEY NEW: Khaled Nordin (Umno VP) 4-publisher 'KO habis'/'kacau daun' (NST+BH+Metro+FMT) = FIRST BN-VP hard-news corroboration of 'Bersatu kacau daun'; Loke 'PH sasar 23 kerusi' (5-publisher, PH-attributed => PRIORITY not CRITICAL); PN 'kongsi pentas' = 4th cooperation stage; Hassan Karim PKR dissent; April 19 royal crisis + 14 Umno ADUN backdoor = election origin; Loke 'campaign on policies' + 'not in Rantau'; Aminuddin small-group + honest defense; N.19 Johol; MCA told-her-to-stay-home viral (9,100 likes).
metadata.score_convention: SIGNED (-1.0 to +1.0). Negative = -1.0 to < -0.20; Neutral = -0.20 to +0.20 (marginal/mixed band); Positive = > +0.20 to +1.0.
metadata.critical_threshold: Sharp sentiment shift >30% change for any PIR-06 entity; Bersatu sharp-negative internal-fracture signal = [CRITICAL]. PIR-16 CRITICAL if hard-news corroborates 'Bersatu exit imminent?' OR Bersatu-attributed 'sasar bentuk kerajaan negeri'.
metadata.election_context: PRN Negeri Sembilan 2026 - Campaign Day 1 (Nomination 18 Jul closed; Day-1 19 Jul). Polling 1 Aug; early voting 28 Jul; BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi + Pertang); PH manifesto launch 20 Jul (Amirudin Shari, Klana Resort). Electorate 889,490 (103 candidates, 36 seats; simple-majority threshold 19).

entities.rationale: rev13 -0.90 -> rev14 -0.92. SIXTH converging [CRITICAL] trigger: Khaled Nordin (Umno VP/Defence Minister) 4-publisher 'Pastikan Bersatu KO habis-habis' + 'kacau daun' (NST+BH+Metro+FMT 23:49-00:16 MYT) — FIRST BN-VP-level hard-news call for Bersatu's ELECTORAL ELIMINATION. Plus 153300 'Bersatu now sole opposition party' (The Vibes 18 Jul) self-positioning. Now 6 triggers: lebih-hebat, sasar-kerajaan solo 24-seat, PN-toksik, quorum+RoS, Hamzah rebuke, Khaled elimination call. Bersatu sharp-negative internal-fracture signal CONFIRMED -> [CRITICAL].

rev13 -0.86 -> rev14 -0.88. SEVENTH trigger: Khaled 'KO habis' + 'kacau daun' hard-news 4-publisher. 24 own-logo seats + lebih-hebat + sasar-kerajaan + PN-toksik + quorum + Hamzah rebuke + Khaled elimination. Bersatu sharp-negative internal-fracture signal CONFIRMED -> [CRITICAL].

rev13 -0.88 -> rev14 -0.89. Khaled (BN VP) elimination call adds a BN-voice to the 3-sided fracture (Bersatu vs PAS/Wawasan vs PN-MT, now + BN-VP anti-Bersatu). Intra-opposition + intra-coalition warfare.

rev13 -0.89 -> rev14 -0.90. Khaled 'KO habis' electoral-elimination rhetoric pushes toward removal trajectory (BN-VP voice). Formal PN-MT expulsion notice STILL NOT issued (11th consecutive pass). Trajectory: pre-threshold; most likely Bersatu voluntary realignment AFTER 1 Aug poll.

Carried rev13. Muhyiddin (Sinar 17 Jul + BH + Metro + MalaysiaGazette + Newswav + Buletin TV3): NEW 'lebih hebat' coalition after PRN NS. >50% viral amplification fires. No formal launch 18-19 Jul — remains hint/bayangan stage. PRU16 realignment vehicle.

entities.entity: sasar bentuk kerajaan negeri (Bersatu solo governing bid)
entities.rationale: Carried rev13. MalaysiaGazette + Sinar (19 Jul 15:37-15:53): Bersatu sasar bentuk kerajaan negeri, tanding 24 kerusi (EXCEEDS simple-majority 19). Director rule: hard-news corroboration = [CRITICAL]. 171500 NOTE: Loke 'PH sasar 23 kerusi' is PH-attributed safe-majority (scored separately PRIORITY); the Bersatu-attributed 24-seat solo version remains the [CRITICAL] signal. DIRECTLY CONTRADICTS PN-MB-concedes-to-BN + joint-manifesto.

Carried rev13. 171500 Metro BM full text corroborates Muhyiddin 'PN sudah jadi parti toksik' + Hamzah rebuttal. Multi-outlet hard-news. Director 'toxic PN' = [CRITICAL] rule. Intra-opposition warfare Wawasan(Hamzah) vs Bersatu(Muhyiddin).

Carried rev13. Kiandee (11 Jul) vs Radzi (11 Jul): disputed baseline 49 vs 23 MPT members, Clause 13.12. Sanjeevan frames 'alasan sekat Bersatu bertanding'. Dispute CONTESTED not resolved. Director-designated [CRITICAL].

Carried rev13. Kiandee claims 27/49 MPT gone -> ~22 remain -> NO quorum. Radzi rebutted: 12/23 sufficient. Disputed baseline UNRESOLVED.
Carried rev13. Kiandee called PN-MT to convene re: Bersatu. Closest-to-formal-PN-action signal. No PN-MT expulsion notice 11 cycles.

Carried rev13. Gerakan expelled Tang Jay Son secara serta-merta (Awani 18 Jul 20:22) for contesting on Bersatu ticket in Rahang. Director flag: any 'pecat' = [CRITICAL]-tier. Bersatu attracting Gerakan defectors -> intra-PN friction.
Carried rev13. Suspended Bersatu VP; cited Clause 13.12, 27/49 MPT gone. Confirmed 'former Bersatu VP' at NST merge-machinery event. Director-designated [CRITICAL] trigger.

rev13 -0.20 -> rev14 -0.22. FMT BM 19 Jul 15:33 (Jalaluddin) + FMT EN 17:02: BN PDM in Klawang (N.28) SHUT DOWN in protest over seat ceded to PN's Danni Rais. Jalaluddin expects reopen 1-2 days. Grassroots-level BN-PN friction. Monitor reopen.

Director PIR-06 keywords 'keluar/pecat/tarik diri' = coalition-membership actions; THIS is electoral-elimination rhetoric by a BN (not PN) leader — adjacent but NOT formal PN-MT expulsion/withdrawal.
